# #9967 phone — real device dialer state (Pixel 6a, Android 16), captured alongside the on-device test
default-dialer: com.google.android.dialer
DIALER-role: com.google.android.dialer

# PhoneStatusInstrumentedTest.read_defaultDialerIsAConcreteSystemPackage reads
# PhoneStatus.read(ctx).defaultDialerPackage == the value above (com.google.android.dialer).
